summary:
# 今日社区动态（MiniMax-M2.7 | 2026-04-11 ~ 2026-04-12）

- 🧠 [Memory](#subsystem-Memory)：DAMON 新增 failed region quota 机制实现精细化资源配额控制，提升内存访问监控灵活性；min_region_sz 参数约束为 2 的幂次方，简化内部计算逻辑并消除边界问题。
- 🧭 [Scheduling](#subsystem-Scheduling)：本期以小修正和清理为主，整体变更风险较低。
- 🌐 [Networking](#subsystem-Networking)：本期网络子系统的变更多为补丁修复和配置更新，无显著新特性或性能优化点。
- 🛡 [Security](#subsystem-Security)：ARM64 新增 CRC64-NEON 硬件加速支持，提升安全加密模块效率；trusted-keys 子系统完成 pr_fmt 重构消除头文件依赖；加密子系统合入 AEAD/SKcipher/X509 等关键修复补丁解决稳定性问题。
- 📈 [Observability](#subsystem-Observability)：LoongArch perf 注解引入 jump__delete 释放跳转表优化内存管理；BPF 新增 fsession 支持增强安全追踪能力；Rust 模块参数系统添加 bool 类型支持；多处修复包括 BPF arena fork VMA use-after-free/fprobe 稳定性/probe tracing 可靠性等安全问题。
- 🗂 [Filesystem & Storage](#subsystem-Filesystem%20%26%20Storage)：新增 VMware VMUFAT 文件系统提升虚拟化兼容性；xfs 清理目录数据块头部布局为后续优化奠基；fat_read_static_bpb() 支持 0xE9 跳转指令兼容特殊 BPB；修复 device-dax 引用计数泄漏、netfs 缓存读取重试逻辑、ntfs 编译器警告等问题。
- 🏗 [Architecture](#subsystem-Architecture)：本期架构相关改动均为小修正和清理工作，变更范围广泛但风险可控。
- 🔋 [Power Management](#subsystem-Power%20Management)：本期电源管理变更以小修正和配置更新为主，整体风险较低。
- ⚙ [Core Kernel](#subsystem-Core%20Kernel)：lib/crypto/chacha 初始化时清零每个密钥状态防止侧信道泄露，该修复同步覆盖 6.12/6.6/6.1/5.15/5.10 多个 LTS 分支确保广泛安全性。
- 🧩 [Virtualization](#subsystem-Virtualization)：KVM arm64 实现多主机 PMU 设备支持解决单 PMU 瓶颈问题，提升多核和高性能计算场景下的性能监控能力；Xen 合并 v7.1-rc1 分支包含 ARM 支持、HVC 控制台、grant-table 和 swiotlb 等更新。
- 🧰 [Drivers](#subsystem-Drivers)：本期驱动改动多为常规修正和清理，未见显著新功能或性能优化。

## Memory
- `perf` `feature` DAMON 引入 DAMOS failed region quota 机制用于资源分配管理。当 DAMOS 操作策略无法完全应用时，该机制提供精细化的资源配额控制能力，提升内存访问监控的灵活性和资源利用效率，是 DAMON 特性集的重要扩展 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/575)
- `feature` DAMON 强制 min_region_sz 参数必须为 2 的幂次方。此约束简化内部计算逻辑并确保内存区域大小对齐的一致性，避免非对齐值导致的潜在边界问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/723)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/188)

## Scheduling
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/253)

## Networking
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/34) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/810) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/88) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/27) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/619) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/348) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/304) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/298) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/105) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/68) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/62) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/721) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/652) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/308) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/306) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/276) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/118) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/547) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/470) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/302)

## Security
- `feature` Eric Biggers 提交了 CRC 硬件加速更新，为 ARM64 架构添加了 CRC64-NEON 内部函数支持和优化实现，通过 Kunit 测试框架增强了 CRC 校验能力，这对于依赖 CRC 校验的内核安全机制和加密子系统的高效运行至关重要 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/750)
- `feature` Josh Snyder 完成了 trusted-keys 子系统的代码重构，将 pr_fmt 宏定义从公共头文件移至各个具体实现文件，消除了不必要的头文件依赖并提升了代码可维护性，这是安全密钥子系统的规范化改进 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/705)
- `bugfix` Herbert Xu 合入了一组加密子系统的关键修复补丁，涵盖 AEAD、SKcipher 算法接口以及 X509 证书解析等核心模块，解决了这些安全相关组件在生产环境中暴露的稳定性问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/93)

## Observability
- `perf` `feature` 为 LoongArch 架构的 perf 注解工具添加了 jump__delete 机制来释放跳转表，显著优化了内存管理效率并防止潜在泄漏 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/105)
- `feature` 为 BPF 添加了缺失的 fsession（函数会话）支持，增强了 BPF 程序的安全追踪和上下文管理能力 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/95)
- `feature` 为内核文档工具添加了 __maybe_unused 属性支持，提升了代码分析的准确性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/741)
- `feature` Rust 模块参数系统新增 bool 类型支持，扩展了 Rust 内核接口的灵活性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/416)
- `bugfix` 修复了 BPF arena 在 fork 时的 VMA use-after-free 漏洞（v4版本），解决了竞态条件导致的内存安全问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/803)
- `bugfix` 修复了 BPF verifier 中的空指针解引用问题（v3版本），增强了内核安全性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/1)
- `bugfix` 修复了 BPF arena fork 时的 VMA 竞态问题（v2版本） [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/317)
- `bugfix` 修复了探针子系统中的多个缺陷，提升了 tracing 可靠性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/315)
- `bugfix` 修复了 arena fork 时 VMA use-after-free 问题（初始版本） [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/310)
- `bugfix` 修复了 fprobe IP 表相关的多个 bug（v4版本），改进了函数入口探针的稳定性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/12)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/321)

## Filesystem & Storage
- `feature` - VMUFAT: 新增VMware VMUFAT文件系统支持，为虚拟化环境提供专用FAT变体，增强虚拟机磁盘镜像兼容性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/519)
- `feature` - xfs: 清理目录数据块头部填充，规范化数据结构设计，为后续目录操作优化奠定基础 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/463)
- `feature` - FAT: 允许fat_read_static_bpb()函数读取时使用0xE9跳转指令附近的数据，解决部分特殊BPB的兼容性读取问题 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/210)
- `bugfix` - device-dax: 修复__devm_create_dev_dax()中的引用计数泄漏，防止设备资源管理下的内存泄漏 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/107)
- `bugfix` - netfs: 修复缓存文件系统和网络文件系统多个问题，包括namei.c迭代器处理和读取重试逻辑错误 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/242)
- `bugfix` - ntfs: 修复NTFS文件系统扩展属性和namei模块中未初始化符号的编译器警告，提高代码健壮性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/102)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/748) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/414)

## Architecture
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/65) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/401) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/751) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/744) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/537) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/535) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/492) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/448) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/420) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/423) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/388) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/325) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/309) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/280) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/274) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/139) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/545) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/277)

## Power Management
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/688) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/8)

## Core Kernel
- `feature` lib/crypto: chacha: Zeroize per-key state on initialization. 在 ChaCha 密码库初始化时清零每个密钥状态，防止旧密钥数据残留于内存导致侧信道泄露风险，提升内核加密模块内存安全防护能力。该补丁同步覆盖 6.12、6.6、6.1、5.15、5.10 多个 LTS 版本以确保广泛安全性 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/772)

## Virtualization
- `perf` `feature` KVM arm64: 实现了多个主机PMU设备支持，提升虚拟化场景下性能监控能力；通过扩展PMU计数器访问机制，解决单PMU瓶颈问题，对多核和高性能计算场景特别重要 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/289)
- `feature` Xen虚拟化: 合并Xen分支到v7.1-rc1，包含ARM Xen支持、HVC控制台、grant-table和swiotlb等驱动更新；这是Xen虚拟化子系统的关键集成，为新版本提供完整的功能支持和稳定性修复 [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/102)

## Drivers
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/55) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/53) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/392) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/462) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/259) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/260) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/505) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/502) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/191) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/342) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/290) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/212) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/80) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/729) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/108) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/515) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/33) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/42) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/711) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/707) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/61) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/91) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/355) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/79) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/690) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/421) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/12/12) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/201) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/226) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/72) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/22) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/731) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/544) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/533) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/123) [↗](https://lkml.org/lkml/2026/4/11/174)

## Other
该补丁集共46个修改，主要涉及drivers/staging、drivers/platform、drivers/bus及.../net等驱动目录，涵盖设备树文档Documentation/devicetree和staging子系统的多处改动。
Unmatched by fixed subsystem rules: 46 items. Consider extending directory rules to improve classification.
标签统计：`feature` 23 / `bugfix` 12 / `other` 11 / `perf` 2。
